'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 15''' was the fifteenth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[April 10]], [[2002]]. The issue was authored by [[Darren Allanson]], [[Andrew Darling]], and [[Iain Lowson]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*[[Battle of the Great Pit of Carkoon|The Battle of the Great Pit of Carkoon]]
*[[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia]]
*[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtroopers]]
*[[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]
*[[TT-8L gatekeeper droid/Legends|TT-8L Door Droid]]
*[[8D smelter droid|8D8 Smelting Operator]]
*[[Force pike/Legends|Force pike]]
*[[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B frigate]]
